title: Why Buy An Expensive Matcha Cake?
about: Why Buy An Expensive Matcha Cake? refers to a video and song by TikToker @MargeCooks where Marge Simpson, via an AI voice, teaches viewers how to make a matcha cake with only four ingredients, singing each step of the recipe. The video was posted on February 9th, 2026 and went viral over the following weeks, inspiring brainrot edits, singing videos, recreations where other characters sing the song and more.
origin: On February 9th, 2026, TikToker [1] @MargeCooks, a cooking page that uses an AI voice of The Simpsons character Marge Simpson to sing the instructions to recipes, posted a video on how to make a matcha cake in four steps. In the video, Marge sings, "Why buy an expensive matcha cake, when you only need four ingredients and a few minutes to make it yourself," then proceeds to sing viewers through the recipe. The video gained over 2.6 million views in a week.
